title: YAGE Crevice Cleaning Brush, Bathroom Tile Groove Gap Cleaning Brush Hand Held Long Handle Cleaning Tool, Home Kitchen Groove Gap Window Door Track Tile Groove Bristle Crevice Cleaning(3pcs）
features: 【New Upgrade】crevice cleaning brush has a large handle for a more comfortable hold and is designed with a non-slip surface，the bristle width of 0.5cm can reach into small cracks, cleaning small gaps is no longer difficult.

【Precision Cleaning】crevice cleaning brush is designed with ultra thin PP bristles that effortlessly reach into small cracks, ensuring thorough and easy cleaning. Say goodbye to dirt and debris hiding in hard-to-reach crevices!
【Compact and Portable】gap cleaning brush allows for preise control and maneuverability, and a hook hole at the bottom for hanging. It is light, compact and easy to store.

【Versatile Cleaning Tool】crevice cleaning brush is not just limited to crevices. It can also be utilized in other challenging areas such as vehicle detailing, computer maintenance, jewelry cleaning, and other delicate tasks that require precise cleaning,Simply rinse the brush under the tap after use to remove residue and debris.

【Guarantee】Every brush has passed strict quality inspections. If you are not satisfied with the product, we guarantee return and full refund. Or if you have any questions or suggestions, please feel free to contact us, we will reply you as soon as possible and solve your problems.
